---
name: Question / Help
about: Ask a question about using Toolpack SDK or debugging your AI agent.
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

**What is your question?**
A clear and concise description of what you are trying to achieve or figure out.

**What have you tried so far?**
Describe any steps you've already taken. Provide code snippets if applicable.

**Environment details (if applicable):**
 - OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
 - Node.js version [e.g. v18.17.0]
 - Toolpack SDK version [e.g. 0.1.0]
